title_en: 1. Write a detailed description of the prayer from takbeer
content_en: until rukoo' (bowing). Place a check mark for correct answers and an 'X' for wrong answers: 1. The ma'moom (the one led in prayer) is prohibited to recite even al-fatihah as long as the Imam is reciting. ( ) 2. It is recommended to raise one's hands up to ears when falling down in prostration. ( ) 3. According to shafi`ee school, tawarruk position is prescribed in all final tashahhuds (whether of two-unit prayer or more). ( ) 4. If one cannot say takbir for prayer in Arabic, he can do it in English. ( ) 5. Reciting al-fatihah in prayer cannot be replaced by any other dhikr (remembrance) for those who cannot learn this surah. ( ) 6. It is not prohibited to hold a copy of the Quran while performing a supererogatory prayer even if one can recite al-fatihah by heart. ( ) 7. The two Tasleems (for the termination of prayer) are among the pillars of prayer. ( ) 166 International University in Latin America
title_id: Soal: Tata Cara Salat dari Takbir hingga Salam
content_id:
1. Tulislah deskripsi lengkap tata cara salat dari takbiratul ihram hingga salam, mencakup: niat, takbiratul ihram, doa iftitah, Al-Fatihah, surah, ruku, iktidal, sujud, duduk di antara dua sujud, tasyahud, dan salam.

Tata cara salat dimulai dengan niat dalam hati disertai takbiratul ihram sambil mengangkat kedua tangan sejajar bahu atau daun telinga. Kemudian membaca doa iftitah (sunnah), lalu taawwuz, kemudian Al-Fatihah (wajib), kemudian surah atau ayat dari Al-Quran (sunnah). Setelah itu ruku sambil membaca "Subhana Rabbiyal Adhim", lalu iktidal sambil membaca "Samiallahu liman hamidah, Rabbana wa lakal hamd", kemudian dua sujud dengan membaca "Subhana Rabbiyal Ala", duduk di antara dua sujud dengan membaca "Rabbighfir li", dan seterusnya hingga tasyahud dan salam.
